recipient_name: Shivi Sharma, Legacy CRM Archive team
subject: Legacy CRM archive lookup — VIN JT4567890ABCDEFGH
body:
Hi Shivi,

We have a VIN whose customer attribution didn't survive the 2019 CRM migration. The VIN persists in downstream systems (telematics, independent-shop service) but the original customer record doesn't link in current Customer Master / CRM.

Could you check the pre-migration archive (archive_legacy_crm_2018) and share the original customer record on file?

VIN: JT4567890ABCDEFGH
Last Legacy CRM activity: 2019-Q1 (coincides with migration cutover)
Downstream activity: Telematics, Independent Shop Service
Record count: 1,247
Geographic cluster: Dallas, TX.

Thanks,
Privacy Operations team

subject: Dealer-network archive lookup — VIN JT4567890ABCDEFGH (referred by Shivi Sharma)
body:
Hi Eric,

Shivi Sharma on the Legacy CRM Migration Archive team referred me to you. We have a VIN whose customer attribution didn't survive the 2019 CRM migration; Shivi checked archive_legacy_crm_2018 and confirmed it's not in her archive — her migration log routed pre-2019 dealer-sourced records to dealer_network_archive_2018, which your team owns.

Could you check that archive and share the original customer record on file?

VIN: JT4567890ABCDEFGH
Last known activity: 2019-Q1 (coincides with migration cutover)
Downstream activity: Telematics, Independent Shop Service
Record count downstream: 1,247
Geographic cluster: Dallas, TX
Referral context: Shivi Sharma's reply — dealer-network routing flag in migration log mig-2019-q1-crm.

Thanks,
Privacy Operations team
Instrata · Communication Coordinator

subject: Your privacy request — confirmation (REQ-MC-REPLY)
body:
Dear Maria,

Thank you for submitting your privacy request. We received it on 2026-03-25 and have begun the review process.

What you asked for: deletion of personal information held by Example Motors and its connected services (CCPA right-to-delete).

What happens next: our team will identify all records associated with the identifiers you provided, apply California's deletion rules, and send you a final report within the 45-day statutory window. If we need clarifying information from you we will reach out.

If you have additional information you would like us to consider — different name, email, phone — please reply to this email and we will incorporate it.

Kind regards,
Privacy Operations team
Instrata · Communication Coordinator
